channel.title: Gui on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Gui on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer

item.title: When & why to use PyAutoGUI
item.description: When PyAutoGUI is the right tool for desktop GUI automation and testing — practical use cases, limitations, and a getting-started walkthrough.

item.title: X virtual framebuffer (Xvfb)
item.description: What Xvfb (X Virtual Framebuffer) is, how it works, and how to use it to run GUI applications in headless Linux environments for CI/CD pipelines and testing.
